name: cv-ia-workspace
description: Workspace scripts for CV-IA frontend/backend scaffold

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && dotnet restore backend/src/CvIa.Api/CvIa.Api.csproj
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run verify:boundary && npm run verify:cv:ats && npm run verify:section-ids
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.verify:bootstrap: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d && npm run verify:health && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run verify:health && npm run verify:cv-pages
